chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI CP No.S-723 of 2025 ____________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) For orders as to maintainability of petition 18.11.2025 Mr. Afaque Ahmed, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Abdul Shakoor, advocate for the respondent No.2 Mr. Ali Zardari, AAG --------- Through the instant petition, the petitioner has challenged the orders dated 30.05.2024, 31.05.2024 and 14.07.2025 passed by learned 13th Family Judge, Karachi Central, whereby CNIC of the petitioner was blocked for non- compliance of the Courts orders to pay decretal amount/maintenance. Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that the petitioner has deposited an amount of Rs.3,75,000/- and he was ready to deposit remaining amount in installments before the learned executing Court. Learned counsel for the respondent and learned AAG have opposed the petition on the ground that the petitioner is liable to pay Rs. 2,368,557.44, which he is avoiding to it since 2016. Be that as it may, the petitioner is at liberty to file an application before the learned trial Court, which shall be considered afresh on merits, coupled with the factual position that the petitioner has deposited an amount of Rs. 3,75,000/- and he was ready to pay the remaining amount in installments. Office is directed to send a copy of this order to the learned executing Court for information and compliance. The petition stands disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE Nadir*
